Name: OvocoCRM 2.0.0
description: Major platform rewrite with new React UI
releaseNotes: Complete platform rewrite from Angular to React. New contact manager, deal pipeline, and public REST API.

Name: OvocoCRM 2.1.0
description: Added email integration and webhook support
components: Contact Manager;Deal Pipeline;Email Integration;REST API;Webhook Service
releaseNotes: Two-way email sync with open and click tracking. Outbound webhook delivery with retry logic.

Name: OvocoCRM 2.2.0
components: Contact Manager;Deal Pipeline;Email Integration;REST API;Webhook Service;Report Generator
releaseNotes: User-defined analytics dashboards and scheduled report generation powered by ClickHouse.

Name: OvocoCRM 2.3.0
description: Performance improvements and mobile API launch
components: Contact Manager;Deal Pipeline;Email Integration;REST API;Webhook Service;Report Generator
releaseNotes: Mobile backend-for-frontend API with GraphQL. Database query optimization reducing p99 latency by 40%.

Name: OvocoCRM 2.3.1
description: Hotfix for contact import race condition
components: Contact Manager;Deal Pipeline;Email Integration;REST API;Webhook Service;Report Generator
releaseNotes: Fixed race condition in bulk contact import that caused duplicate records under concurrent requests.

Name: OvocoCRM 2.4.0
description: Bulk export, improved search, and EU deployment readiness
components: Contact Manager;Deal Pipeline;Email Integration;REST API;Webhook Service;Report Generator
releaseNotes: Bulk contact export with custom field selection. Full-text search improvements. EU region deployment preparation.
